title: GoldRush MCP Server
description: Model Context Protocol server exposing GoldRush APIs to LLMs and AI agents.
useCase: Connect Claude Desktop or Cursor to GoldRush so the AI can answer on-chain questions directly — no custom code needed, just configure the MCP server and start asking questions.

keyParams.GOLDRUSH_API_KEY: GoldRush API key configured in MCP server environment
